benefits.description: Great for energy while on a cut

side_effects.description: MOTS-c can sting when injected subcutaneously; recommends diluting and injecting in the buttocks

protocol_notes: Recommends against Capromorelin due to high appetite suppression. Suggests slowly increasing Retatrutide dose as needed. Mentions preferring GH for cost and convenience (less frequent pinning), and advises awareness of water retention and insulin resistance with proper titration. Also mentions Semax as a nootropic option.
